subject: [PORTALNG] 15.0.0 release
commit_message:
[PORTALNG] 15.0.0 release

- keycloak based RBAC for bff
- add default user information for initial ONAP users
  such that this info must not be provided anymore on the
  first ui login
- fix helm lint issue in robot subchart

Issue-ID: PORTALNG-169
Change-Id: I24f61d101945117e760af37c6ba1dc69f63b41c9
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
